titleStmt.title: SII 9.607: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 607. (A.R. No. 707 of 1922.) ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1465, Śōbhakṛit, Bhādrapada, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1543 September 10, Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the village Niṭūru in Tekkalakōṭe-sīme and some fields and a garden at Ānegondi granted by the king to Tiruveṅgaḷāchārya, son of Tirumala-Avuku-Tātāchārya of Śaṭhamarshaṇa-gōtra Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā were granted for offerings to the god Viṭṭhaladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruśa 1465 neya śōbhakṛtusaṁvacharada bhādrapada śu . 12 rallū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra
sadāśivarāyamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgaiutaṁ yiralu śrīviṭhaladēvara Amrutapaḍige pulipaṭu naivēdyake madhyaēkāśe dōdaśe puṇyakāladalu śaṭhamaruśaṇagōtra
da Āpastaṁbhasūtrada Ejhaśākhādhyayarāda tirumala Āukutātācāryyara komāraru tiruveṁgaḷaĀcāryyārāda namage sadāśivadēvamahārāyariṁda dhārāgruhīta
vāgi baṁda tekkalakōṭe sīme voḷagaṇa niṭūra grāma 1 Ānegoṁdiyalu Aḍavigeṟeya voḷage gade yikhaṁḍuga gade liṁgarasara teṁginayirugōra tōṭa 1 yiṣṭanu śrīviṭhala dēva
rige pulivaṭu naivēdyake samarpisideU . yidake dina 1 kaṁ naḍeva naivēdya kaṭaḷe harivaṇa 8 kam Aki pa 80 mēlu vecake ca ¥ 4 ¥ 0 paṁcaparva Ayidakaṁ sukhi paḍi naivēdyake ca ga 150
tirunāḷu 2 kaṁ di 20 sukhi naivēdya ga 6 . Ūṭi tirunāḷu 3 modaliĀḷvāra
guḍiya rāmāṁjakūṭake di 1 kaṁ 1 �yo rītiyalu nityanaimittikagaḷu naḍaluḷadu .
prasādakaṁ modali Āḷuvāraguḍi rāmāṁjakūṭake hari 2 guḍiya nervāhadivaru stānikaru
dēmaya narasaya vīrapa cikavīrapa puruśōttama Ā pālu 5 dēvara boksake pālu 1
naṭuvaraṁgya pālu 1 sēnabhōva kōnapa pālu 1 Akhila sahasra grāmada Anaṁtaya pā .
bhāravarige pālu 1 svayaṁpākigaḷu pālu 1 gaḷiyāra haḷi Ūra pālu 1 ḷige pā 1 bhaṁḍāradavarige pālu . yā paḍisuva Āuku tiruveṁgaḷaĀcāryyarige pā 1 yī mariyādeyali naivēdya prasādavanu �yo prāpti tegedukoṁḍu Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍeyaluḷadu Eṁdu
samarpisida dharmmaśāśana �yo dharmmakke Āru tappidaru śrīviṭhaladēvara śrīpādake tapidavaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.607 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
